title: lippia hirsuta
intro: Lippia hirsuta, also known as African bush tea or wild tea, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and fight off infections. The health benefits of Lippia hirsuta include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Lippia hirsuta can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
